The Paris Olympic Games came to a celebratory close on Sunday, after two weeks of intense competitions, controversial calls and outcomes, and record-breaking feats. There were some touching moments during the games that showed people that the Olympics are not only about winning medals, but also about writing a story of friendship, respect and integrity among nations.
